plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI ts Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Type text into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option': 'Teams Agent with Data'.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of "Teams Agent with Data" from the dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 SDK environment.
Type the text 'Customize' into the dropdown input field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' in the 'Teams Agent with Data' interface of Microsoft 365 Toolkit.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted "Customize" option in the search dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" panel of Microsoft Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the "Default folder" within the "Workspace Folder" dialog in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
